title: Food Craft
description: Food Craft is a mod that adds more types of food to Minecraft.
body:
# Foodcraft
Welcome to Foodcraft! This mod adds many variants of food that you can get in Minecraft, including sliced foods, burgers, eggs, bacon, and more!

## How to use: Cutting Board
In Foodcraft, there is a block that is nessecarry for progression for making certain foods. This is the cutting board. To craft it, put two planks of wood (any type) in a crafting table. This will result in the cutting board being made.

To use it, craft an iron sword and right-click on the cutting board to slice the item on the cutting board.

## Custom villager type?
There is a new custom villager type in this mod, related with the cutting board. To get it, all you need to do is have a villager use a cutting board (as a profession block). The villager will then transform into a customer villager. The customer villager is a new villager type that you can serve food and receive emeralds.

There is still much more in this mod than just this, so find out by playing the mod!
